description: Refactor OpenCode executors to use getModelTargetFormat() dynamically (like OmniRoute) instead of hardcoded MESSAGES_MODELS/CLAUDE_FORMAT_MODELS Sets, and fix providerModels targetFormat annotations so model routing works correctly for all OpenCode Free models.
steps: 1. In open-sse/executors/opencode.ts: Remove the hardcoded MESSAGES_MODELS Set. Import getModelTargetFormat from ../config/providerModels. Refactor buildUrl(model) to call getModelTargetFormat('oc', model) and route to /zen/v1/messages when targetFormat is 'claude', otherwise /zen/v1/chat/completions. This matches exactly how OmniRoute's OpencodeExecutor works.

2. In open-sse/executors/opencode-zen.ts: Remove the hardcoded CLAUDE_FORMAT_MODELS Set. Import getModelTargetFormat from ../config/providerModels. Refactor buildUrl(model) to call getModelTargetFormat('opencode-zen', model) and route to /zen/v1/messages when targetFormat is 'claude', otherwise /zen/v1/chat/completions. Also update buildHeaders to use the same dynamic check.

3. In open-sse/config/providerModels.ts for the 'oc' key: Add targetFormat: 'claude' to qwen3.6-plus-free (matching how qwen3.6-plus has targetFormat: 'claude' in opencode-zen). The minimax-m2.5-free already correctly has targetFormat: 'claude'.

4. Verify consistency: In open-sse/config/providerModels.ts for the 'opencode-zen' key, confirm that qwen3.6-plus-free also has targetFormat: 'claude' (it currently does NOT - add it if missing, since it routes to the same /messages endpoint as the non-free version).
acceptance_criteria: opencode.ts executor no longer contains any hardcoded model Sets - it uses getModelTargetFormat dynamically
opencode-zen.ts executor no longer contains any hardcoded model Sets - it uses getModelTargetFormat dynamically
qwen3.6-plus-free in the 'oc' providerModels has targetFormat: 'claude'
qwen3.6-plus-free in the 'opencode-zen' providerModels has targetFormat: 'claude'
findings: All changes verified: typecheck passes, all 1154 tests pass. The getModelTargetFormat function was already available in providerModels.ts, so the refactoring was clean. Both executors now dynamically look up targetFormat from the PROVIDER_MODELS registry instead of maintaining separate hardcoded Sets.
